content: Fibonacci retracement levels (23.6%, 38.2%, 50%, 61.8%, 78.6%) are horizontal lines indicating potential support/resistance. Derived from Fibonacci sequence ratios, they're widely watched, creating self-fulfilling dynamics. Drawn from swing high to low (or vice versa). The 61.8% ('golden ratio') is most significant. Effectiveness stems from widespread use rather than mathematical necessity. Best combined with other confluence factors.
